description: The staging CI/CD pipeline is blocked because the Kustomize overlay for the `payment-gateway` application is broken. Debug and fix the `kustomization.yaml` and `cm-patch.yaml` files located at `/home/ga/Desktop/payment-gateway/overlays/staging/`. The overlay must build successfully and be deployed to the local cluster. Ensure all resources are in the `payment-staging` namespace, carry the label `environment: staging`, run 3 replicas using the `nginx:1.24-alpine` image, and include a ConfigMap setting `LOG_LEVEL` to `DEBUG`. A pre-configured `kubectl` binary is available to communicate with the Rancher-managed cluster.
